title: Monetdb Bugs in Subselect statements:
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE testTable3 (X Int32, Y String, Z Float64 DEFAULT NULL);
SELECT X, Y, (SELECT COUNT() FROM testTable3 AS inner WHERE inner.Y IS NULL AND inner.X = outer.X) FROM testTable3 AS outer;
key_bug_features: Subselect statements with null values in outer query
